summary.en: An AI agent that automates creditworthiness checks by retrieving applicant data, scoring risk, and generating decision-ready summaries—faster approvals with consistent policy enforcement.
summary.ko: An AI agent that automates creditworthiness checks by retrieving applicant data, scoring risk, and generating decision-ready summaries—faster approvals with consistent policy enforcement.
summary.ja: 申込者データの取得、リスクスコアリング、意思決定用サマリーの生成を自動化し、ポリシーを一貫適用しながら審査の迅速化を実現するAIエージェント。

title.en: AIP Use Case: Credit Check AI Agent
title.ko: AIP Use Case: Credit Check AI Agent
title.ja: AIP活用事例： クレジット審査AIエージェント
